questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.A girl introduces a boy as the son of the brother of her mother. How is the boy related to the girl?
questions.solution:
Brother of mother — Uncle; Uncle’s son — Cousin.

Hence, option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
The sister of the wife of Arnav's father, is the mother of Arnav's uncle's daughter Anu. How Anu is related to Arnav?
questions.solution:
Wife of Arnav's father means Arnav's mother.

Sister of Arnav'e mother means Arnav's aunt.

Arnav's aunt is the mother of Arnav's uncle's daughter Anu.

Thus Anu is related to Arnav as his/her cousin sister.

Hence option (B) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Mr. Sohan said to Mohan, “This girls is the wife of the grandson of my mother”. How is Sohan related to this girl?
questions.solution:
The girl is the wife of the grandson of my mother – Sohan’s daughter-in-law
Therefore, Mr. Sohan is the Father-in-law of that girl.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Ashok is the father of the brother of the daughter of Ananya's husband. How Ananya is related to Ashok?
questions.solution:
Daughter of Ananya's husband = Ananya's daughter.

Brother of Ananya's daughter = Ananya's son.

Father of Ananya's son = Ashok.

Thus Ananya is related to Ashok as his wife.

Hence option (B) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
A@B means A is Father of B, A#B means A is Brother of B, A%B means A is Sister of B, A$B means A is Mother of B. [Set 2 Q. 2]

How P’s only brother is related to Q, if Q is maternal Aunt of daughter of Father whose only sister is P?
questions.solution:
P’s only brother is married to Q’s sister. Both P and Q are females. Married couple has one daughter. Thus P's brother is related to Q as her brother-in-law.
 
Or 
 
P's only brother is married to sister-in-law of Q. Then also both P and Q are females. Married couple has one daughter. In such a case also P's brother will be related to Q as her brother-in-law.
 

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
B is grandson of E, who is husband of C. D is wife of P, who is father of B. C is mother of S, who is brother of P.

How is S related to D?
questions.solution:
Family Tree


Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Pointing to a boy, Saras said, "His father's wife's brother is the only brother of my sister's father." How is the boy related to Saras?
questions.solution:
Boy's father's wife means his 'mother'.

His mother's brother means his 'maternal uncle'.

Saras' sister's father means Saras' father.

Boy's maternal uncle is the only brother of Saras' father.

Boy's maternal uncle is the paternal uncle of Saras.

This clearly means that the boy is the cousin brother of Saras.

Hence option (C) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.If P is the brother of the son of Q’s son, how is P related to Q?
questions.solution:
Son of Q’s son — Grandson; Brother of Q’s grandson — Q’s grandson.
So, P is Q’s grandson.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing towards a girl in the photograph, Pooja (Female) said. “She is the mother of Jyoti whose father is my son.” How is Pooja related to the girl in the photograph?
questions.solution:
Jyoti is the daughter of Pooja’s son, and the girl is Jyoti’s mother.
 
So, the girl is Pooja’s son’s wife i.e. Pooja is the girl’s mother-in-law.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
B and C are siblings. M has two children and he is son of E, who is father-in-law of H. H has only one son. C is not granddaughter of E.

How is H related to M?
questions.solution:
Family Tree

H is wife of M.

Hence, the optiion B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
A, B, C, I, J and K are six family members. J is son of I, who is not the mother of J. B is brother of I. K and I are a married couple. C is daughter of K, who is sister of A.
 
How is J related to C?
questions.solution:
Hence, J is brother of C.

Hence, the option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing to a Woman on the Station, Maya said, “She is the sister of the father of my mother’s son.” Who is the woman to Maya?
questions.solution:
Maya’s mother’s son — Maya’s brother; Maya’s brother’s father — Maya’s father; Maya’s father’s sister — Maya’s aunt.

Hence, option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Read the given information carefully and answer the questions given beside:

In a family of some persons Bhanu says that Rani is the daughter of my sister Banti, who is the only daughter of Tamanna. Rahul is the child of Tamanna and Rohan, who is the grandmother of Harish. Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish. Rahul is unmarried.
How is Harish related to Tamanna?
questions.solution:
Following common explanation, we can say that Harish's gender is not known and therefore Harish could be either the granddaughter or grandson of Tamanna.
 
Clearly, option D is the correct answer.

Final image:
 

Common Explanation :
 
Reference :
 
In a family of some persons Bhanu says that Rani is the daughter of my sister Banti, who is the only daughter of Tamanna.
 
Rahul is the child of Tamanna and Rohan, who is the grandmother of Harish.
 
Rahul is unmarried.
 
Inference :
 
From the above hints, following two cases arise.
 
Case 1: When Harish is the child of Banti

 

Case 2 : When Harish is the child of Bhanu


Reference :
 
Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish.
 
As Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish. Thus Harish and Mohan are siblings.
 
So, Banti can't be mother of Harish, therefore case 1 fails.
 
Thus Harish is the daughter of Bhanu and Krishna is his wife.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
B and C are siblings. M has two children and he is son of E, who is father-in-law of H. H has only one son. C is not granddaughter of E.

How is B related to E?
questions.solution:
Family Tree

B is granddaughter of E.

Hence, the option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.Pointing towards Ritka, Nirdosh said, “I am the only son of her mother’s son.” How is Ritka related to Nirdosh?
questions.solution:
Ritka’s mother’s son — Ritka’s brother.
So, Nirdosh is the son of Ritka’s brother or Ritka is Nirdosh’s aunt.

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Introducing Asha to guests, Mr. Bhaskar said, “Her father is the only son of my father”. How is Asha related to Bhaskar?
questions.solution:
Only son of Bhaskar’s father means Bhaskar himself

Therefore, Asha is the daughter of Bhaskar.


Hence, the option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Read the given information carefully and answer the questions given beside:

In a family of some persons Bhanu says that Rani is the daughter of my sister Banti, who is the only daughter of Tamanna. Rahul is the child of Tamanna and Rohan, who is the grandmother of Harish. Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish. Rahul is unmarried.
If Sanjay is spouse of Banti, how is Krishna related to Sanjay?
questions.solution:
From common explanation, we have

Clearly, Krishna is the wife of Bhanu who is brother in law of Sanjay.
 
Hence, option C is the correct answer.

Final image:
 

Common Explanation :
 
Reference :
 
In a family of some persons Bhanu says that Rani is the daughter of my sister Banti, who is the only daughter of Tamanna.
 
Rahul is the child of Tamanna and Rohan, who is the grandmother of Harish.
 
Rahul is unmarried.
 
Inference :
 
From the above hints, following two cases arise.
 
Case 1: When Harish is the child of Banti

 

Case 2 : When Harish is the child of Bhanu


Reference :
 
Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish.
 
As Krishna is the mother of Mohan, who is the only sister of Harish. Thus Harish and Mohan are siblings.
 
So, Banti can't be mother of Harish, therefore case 1 fails.
 
Thus Harish is the daughter of Bhanu and Krishna is his wife.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Alia is the only sister of the wife of Anushka's brother Aditya. How Aditya is related to Alia?
questions.solution:
Wife of Anushka's brother Aditya means Aditya's wife.

Aliya is the only sister of the wife of Anushka's brother Aditya means Alia is the sister of Aditya's wife.

This clearly means that Alia is the sister-in-law of Aditya.

Thus Aditya is related to Alia as her brother-in-law.

Hence option (B) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Introducing a man, a woman said "His mother is the only daughter of my father". How is the man related to the women ?
questions.solution:
His mother is the only daughter of my father - Herself that woman. 
 
Therefore, that man is a woman's son.


Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

A, B, C, I, J and K are six family members. J is son of I, who is not the mother of J. B is brother of I. K and I are a married couple. C is daughter of K, who is sister of A.
 
How many female members are there in the family?
questions.solution:

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
B is father of Q. B has only two children. Q is the brother of R. R is the daughter of P. A is the granddaughter of P. S is the father of A. How is S related to Q?
questions.solution: Hence, the option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Introducing Reeta, Sarika said, “She is the only daughter of my father’s only daughter.” How is Sarika related to Reeta?
questions.solution:
Case I, if Sarika is a female.
Sarika’s father’s only daughter — Sarika.
So, Reeta is Sarika’s daughter, i.e. Sarika is Reeta’s mother.

Case II, if Sarika is a male.
Sarika’s father’s only daughter — Sarika's sister
So, Reeta is Sarika’s sister's daughter, i.e., Sarika is Reeta's uncle.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing to a picture, Aamir said, She is the mother of my Son’s wife’s daughter. How is Lady related to the Aamir?
questions.solution:
Aamir’s son’s wife’s daughter — Aamir’s son’s daughter; Mother of daughter of Aamir’s son — Wife of Aamir’s son.So, Aamir is the father-in-law of the lady.

Hence, the option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.Pointing to a boy, a woman said, “His mother is the only daughter of my mother.” How is the woman related to the boy?
questions.solution:
Only daughter of my mother — Myself.
So, the woman is boy’s mother.

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing towards a Boy, Arpita said, "That boy is the son of the daughter of my paternal grandmother". How is the boy related to Arpita?
questions.solution:
That boy is the son of the daughter of Patternal Grand Father of Arpita, it means that boy is the son of Arpita's Aunt. Therefore, that boy is the cousin of Arpita.
 
Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.Pointing to a man in a picture,  the girl Aisha said, “His mother’s only daughter is my mother.” How is Aisha related to that man?
questions.solution:
Aisha’s mother’s mother is man’s mother i.e., Aisha’s mother is man’s sister or Aisha is man’s niece.

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing to a lady, Shahrukh said, “She is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother.” How is the lady related to Shahrukh?
questions.solution:
Only child of Shahrukh’s grandmother — Shahrukh’s father/mother.
 
Daughter of Shahrukh’s father/mother — Shahrukh’s sister.

Hence, the option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

B is grandson of E, who is husband of C. D is wife of P, who is father of B. C is mother of S, who is brother of P.

Family Tree

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
If Amitabh says, “Ritik’s mother is the only daughter of my mother”, how is Amitabh related to Ritik?
questions.solution:
Only daughter of Amitabh’s mother — Amitabh’s sister.

So, Ritik’s mother is Amitabh’s sister or Amitabh is the brother of Ritik’s mother i.e. Ritik’s maternal uncle.

Hence, the option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Raghav is the son of Rishabh who is the son of Rakhi. Riya is the only sister of Raman and Raghav whose mother is Rima. How Rakhi is related to Riya ?
questions.solution:
From the above image the gender of rakhi is not clear. Thus we cannot determine whether he/she is grandfather or grandmother of Riya.

Hence option (C) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Pointing to a boy in a photograph, a girl said, "His father's mother is the mother-in-law of my brother's mother." How is the person in photograph related to the girl?
questions.solution:
Girl's brother's mother means girl's 'mother'.

Mother-in-law of girl's mother means her grandmother.

Mother of the father of the boy in photograph is his 'grandmother'.

So, the boy's grandmother is also girl's grandmother.

This clearly means that the boy is related to the girl as her 'Brother.'

Hence option (C) is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Abhishek is son of Amitabh’s father’s sister. Prakash is son of Teji who is mother of Vikas who is a male and grandmother of Amitabh. Harivansh is father of Neela and grandfather of Abhishek. Teji is wife of Harivansh.

How is Vikas’s wife related to Neela?
questions.solution:
Neela is sister of Vikas, Therefore, Vikas's wife is sister-in-law of Neela.

Hence, the option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing towards a boy, Shreya said, “His mother’s brother is the father of my son Manish.” How is boy related to Shreya?
questions.solution:
Father of Shreya’s son — Shreya’s husband. So, boy is the son of sister of Shreya’s husband. Thus, boy is Shreya’s nephew.

Hence, the option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
Introducing a girl. Ronit said, " He is the daughter of the daughter of my grandfather's only son", How is that girl related to Ronit?
questions.solution:
" He is the daughter of the daughter of my grandfather's only son"

My grandfather's only Son -  It means Ronit's father.

Daughter of my grandfather's only son - Ronit's father's daughter. It means Ronit's sister.

Daughter of the daughter of my grandfather - It means Ronit's sister's daughter.

Hence, that girl is a niece of Ronit.

Hence, option B is correct
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing to a boy on the stage, Aashi said, “He is the brother of the daughter of the wife of my husband.” How is the boy on the stage related to Aashi?
questions.solution:
Wife of Aashi’s husband — Aashi; Brother of daughter — Son.
So, the boy on the stage is Aashi’s son.

Hence, option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Looking at a picture of a boy, Hemant said, “His mother is the wife of my father’s son. Brothers and sisters I have none.” At whose picture was Hemant looking?
questions.solution:
Since Hemant has no brother or sister, so he is his father’s only son.
So, wife of Hemant’s father’s son — Hemant’s wife.
Thus, Hemant’s wife is the boy’s mother or the boy is Hemant’s son.

Hence, the option A is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following questions carefully and choose the right answer.
A@B means A is Father of B, A#B means A is Brother of B, A%B means A is Sister of B, A$B means A is Mother of B. [Set 2 Q.1]

Then which of the following expressions shows that A is Paternal Uncle of S?
questions.solution:
Option: A
 
 A is the mother of S. S is 
 brother   of   N.  N  is  the 
 father of E. E is the sister
 of B.


 
 Here A is mother of S.

 Option: B

 E is the Brother of M. M 
 is  the  sister  of N. N is
 the  Mother  of   A. A  is
 the Father of S.

 
Here A is the father
of S.

 Option: C 
 
 S  is  the sister of E. E is
 the brother of A. A is the
 mother  of  M.  M  is  the
 father of N.
 

 
Here A is sister of S.

 Option: D

 N is the  mother of A. A
 is the brother of M. M is
 the father  of E. E is the
 sister of S.

 
 Here A is Paternal
 Uncle of S
 

Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

Pointing to a photograph, a woman said, “His father is the only son of my daughter’s grandmother’s husband.” How is the person in the photograph related to the woman?
questions.solution:
Person’s father = Only son of woman’s daughter’s grandfather’s husband’s = Woman’s husband.

Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing out a man receiving the prize, Malaika said, “He is the brother of my uncle’s daughter.” Who is the man to Malaika?
questions.solution:
Brother of uncle’s daughter — Uncle’s son — Cousin.

So, the man is Malaika’s cousin.

Hence, the option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing towards another boy Veena said “He is the son of only son of my paternal grandfather”. How is that boy related to Veena?
questions.solution:
He is the  son of only son of my grandfather – Veen’s Father’s son
 
Therefore, that boy is a Veena’s brother.

Hence, the option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and answer the questions given below.
Pointing to a girl in the picture, Salman said, “Her mother’s brother is the only son of my mother’s father.” How is the girl’s mother related to Salman if the girl is not the real sister of Salman?
questions.solution:
Only son of Salman’s mother’s father — Salman’s maternal uncle.

So, the girl’s maternal uncle is Salman’s maternal uncle.

Thus, the girl’s mother is Salman’s aunt.

Hence, the option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the given codes and answer the question:

If,
A+B means A is the son of B.

A=B means A is the sister of B.

A-B means B is the wife of A.

A×B means A is the brother of B.

A÷B means A is the mother of B.


Then what do we mean by X + Z-  Y ?
questions.solution:
According to the given information:

+: Son of

=: Sister of

-: Wife of

×: Brother of

÷: Mother of

Given expression : X+Y-Z 
Here, we can see that X will be the son of Y, and Z is the wife of Y.
So, we can say that Y is the father of X, and Z will be the mother of X.

Hence, the correct answer is Y is the father of X.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Read the following information carefully and answer the questions which follow.

If ' A×B ' means 'A is son of B'.

If ' A+B ' means 'A is daughter of B'.

If ' A÷B ' means 'A is wife of B'.

If ' A-B ' means 'A is father of B'.

Which of the following relations are true based upon the relations given in the equation ' S÷T×V-W+Y '?
questions.solution:
Given expression, S÷T×V-W+Y



Clearly, T is son of Y, hence S becomes daughter-in-law of Y.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions : Read the following information carefully to answer the question:
(i) 'A$B' means 'A is the mother of B'.
(ii) 'A#B' means 'A is the father of B'.
(iii) 'A@B' means 'A is the brother of B'.
(iv) 'A%B' means 'A is the sister of B'.
(v) 'A^B' means 'A is the husband of B'.
(vi) 'A&B' means 'A is the son of B'.

Which of the following indicates that Z is the brother of N?
questions.solution:
As per the given information in the question, we have understood that:

$ means ‘mother of’

# means ‘father of’

@ means ‘brother of’

% means ‘sister of’

^ means ‘husband of’

& means ‘son of’.

Now if we check Z@S%R@N, we will get:

Z ‘brother of’ S

S ‘sister of’ R

R ‘brother of’ N.

So, if Z is brother of S and S is sister of R, then Z is also brother of R.

Moreover, if R is brother of N, then Z is also brother of N.

Therefore, the statement Z@S%R@N is True.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Read the following information carefully and answer the question given below-

(i) ‘P × Q’ means ‘P is sister of Q’.
(ii) ‘P + Q’ means ‘P is mother of Q’.
(iii) ‘P - Q’ means ‘P is father of Q’.
(iv) ‘P ÷ Q’ means ‘P is brother of Q’.

Which of the following represents ‘W is grand father of H’?
questions.solution:
The given statement are 

‘P × Q’ means ‘P is the sister of Q’.
 ‘P + Q’ means ‘P is the mother of Q’.
 ‘P - Q’ means ‘P is the father of Q’.
 ‘P ÷ Q’ means ‘P is the brother of Q’.

By decoding given information with symbols of the family diagram, we get

 We can check all the options for the required relationship the family diagram, and we get,

(a) (W + T-H) = Rejected

Therefore, W is the grandmother of H.

 

(b) (W ÷T —H) = Rejected

Therefore, W is uncle of H.

(c) (W×T +H) = Rejected

Therefore, W is the aunt of H.

(d) (W +T ÷H) = Rejected

Therefore, W

Hence, there is no option that satisfies the required relationship W is the grandfather of H. So, None of these is correct to answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the following information and answer the question given below.

N is father of D. D is the sister of K. K is the son of T. J is son of K. M is the brother of J. C is the wife of K. B is the daughter of D.

Who is wife of N?
questions.solution:
According to the information given in the question,

According to the information given in the question,

D and K are siblings N is the father of D. T is the mother of K. D and K are the children of N and T. So T should be the wife of N.

Hence, the answer is 'T'.

D and K are the children of N and T. So T should be the wife of N.

Hence, the answer is 'T'.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the following information and answer the question given below.

1. Golu, Rahul and Saleel are children of Mr. and Mrs. Kohli.
2. Rashmi, Rakesh and Sushil are children of Mr. and Mrs. Chandel.
3. Sushil and Golu are married and Aasharam and Sankar their children.
4. Geeta and Rao are children of Mr. and Mrs. Cobara.
5. Geeta is married to Saleel and has three children Rita, Sagar,Raman

How is Rahul related to Saleel?
questions.solution:
According to the given information in the question,

Rahul and saleel and Golu are the children of  Mr. and Mrs. Kohli. They are siblings. So Rahul could be a brother of saleel.

Hence, the answer is 'Brother'.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the following information and give the answer of the question:

Daksh has a brother Ajit. Chandra is the father of Daksh. Jeet is the son of Ajit. How Jeet is related to Daksh?
questions.solution:
In the following diagram, the circle represents the male and the square represents the female. Dash (−) represents siblings. The vertical lines represent the relation between parents and children and the horizontal lines represent the relation between husband and wife.

By applying all the conditions, the relationship between all of them are as follows:

From the above diagram it is clear that Daksh has a brother Ajit. Chandra is the father of Daksh. Jeet is the son of Ajit. So, Jeet is nephew of Daksh.

Hence, 'Nephew' is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Study the following information and answer the question given below.

1. Golu, Rahul and Saleel are children of Mr. and Mrs. Kohli.
2. Rashmi, Rakesh and Sushil are children of Mr. and Mrs. Chandel.
3. Sushil and Golu are married and Aasharam and Sankar their children.
4. Geeta and Rao are children of Mr. and Mrs. Cobara.
5. Geeta is married to Saleel and has three children Rita, Sagar,Raman

How is Rao related to Saleel?
questions.solution:
According to the given information in the question,

Geeta and Rao are the children of Mr. and Mrs. Cobara. They are siblings.Geeta is married to Saleel. So Rao is brother-in-law to saleel.

Hence, the answer is 'Brother in law'.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A is son of B. B is son of C. D is sister of E. E is father of F. G is sister of B. C is married to D. How is E related to G?
questions.solution:
The generation diagram and the meaning of symbols is shown below:

From the generation diagram, we can deduce that G is the daughter of D and E is the brother of D

So, E is the maternal uncle of G.

Therefore, 'maternal uncle' is the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: A is the brother of C. C is the father of D. E is mother of B. B and D are brothers. Then what is the relationship between E and C?
questions.solution:
B and D are brothers and hence their father is C and their mother is E. So, C and E are related as husband and wife.

Hence, from above, E is the wife of C.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.q: A and B are married couple. X and Y are brothers. X is the brother of A. How is Y related to B?
questions.solution:
A - B = Couple

X - Y = Brother

X - A = Brother

Y - A = Brother

The following figure can represents the relation

Thus, it can be concluded that Y is brother-in-law of B.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: K is brother of T. M is the mother of K. W is the brother of M. How is W related to T?
questions.solution:
Family tree is as follows

M is the mother of both K and T. W is the brother of M. So, W will be maternal uncle of K and T.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Pointing to a boy in a photograph, Akhil says, 'He is the son of my mother's only son'. How is Akhil related to that boy?
questions.solution:
By pointing a boy in the photograph, Akhil said that boy is the son of my mother's son which defines that Akhil's mother has a single male child which is Akhil himself and according to Akhil's statement that boy is his son.

This can be represented through the family tree as:

Therefore, it can be concluded that Akhil is the father of the boy.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: If Kamal says, “Ravi’s mother is the only daughter of my mother”. How is Kamal related to Ravi?
questions.solution:
Only daughter of Kamal’s mother – Kamal’s sister.

So, Ravi’s mother is Kamal’s sister or Kamal is the brother of Ravi’s mother i.e., Ravi’s maternal uncle.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
X is the son of W and W is the brother of V. V is the sister of U. How is U related to X?

(A) Cannot be determine

(B) Sister

(C) Daughter

(D) Mother
questions.solution:
According to the question,

X is the son of W.

W is the brother of U and V.

V is the sister of U and W.

U is the uncle or aunt of X. Gender of U is not confirm as per the given information.

So the answer is can't be determined.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning

questions.q: Introducing Suneeta, Amar said, "She is the wife of my mother's only son." How is Suneeta related to Amar?
questions.solution:
According to the question,

Wife of Amar's mother's only son→Amar's wife

Suneeta is Amar's wife.

Hence, option (A) is correct.

questions.q:
Study the following information carefully and answer the questions given below :

S is the daughter of U. V has only two children- S and Y. Y is married to D. P is the brother of B. V has only two daughters. J is the mother of U. J is married to L P is married to S. V is the son of T.

Who among the following is the father of U?
questions.solution: S is the daughter of U and V. Y is also daughter of U and V. Y is the wife of D. P is the husband of S. S is the sister-in-law of B. V is the husband of U. L is the husband of J. L is the father of U.

Study the following information carefully and answer the questions given below :

S is the daughter of U. V has only two children- S and Y. Y is married to D. P is the brother of B. V has only two daughters. J is the mother of U. J is married to L P is married to S. V is the son of T.

How is V related to P?
questions.solution: S is the daughter of U and V. Y is also daughter of U and V. Y is the wife of D. P is the husband of S. S is the sister-in-law of B. V is the husband of U. L is the husband of J. P is the husband of S. V is the father of S. Therefore, V is the father-in-law of P.

questions.solution: S is the daughter of U and V. Y is also daughter of U and V. Y is the wife of D. P is the husband of S. S is the sister-in-law of B. V is the husband of U. L is the husband of J. L is the father of U. S is the sister-in-law of B.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Shobha is the niece of Ashish. Ashish's mother is Priya. Kamla is Priya's mother. Kamla's husband is Hari. Krishna is the mother-in-law of Hari. How is Shobha related to Hari?
questions.solution:
Let us draw the family tree with the help of given statement.

According to the question,

  • Shobha is the niece of Ashish. Ashish's mother is Priya.
  • Kamla is Priya's mother. Kamla's husband is Hari. Krishna is the mother-in-law of Hari.

Thus, the family tree diagram will be : 


Ashish is Shobha's uncle and Hari is Ashish's mother's father. Hence, Shobha is the great-grand daughter of Hari.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
